violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth or sanitizer solution for wiping food spills was not clean. -Sani buckets at burger station and icecream station were both cloudy/visibly soiled.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Broiler chest freezer lid is damaged/warped and does not close properly.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Minimal black debris at bottom edge of interior panel of ice machine.--Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Residue build up at egg cooker. -Residue at side edges of hot hold edges. -Dried food debris on blades of onion slicer.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Grease/debris build up at lines and back side of under counter freezer at cookline. -Dried food debris at dump sink next to dessert station. -Debris build up at drain lines of both soda dispensers. -Water in bottom of cold hold unit (orange cold foam storage) and black debris at door gaskets.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Dust/debris at ceiling tiles above fry storage. -Dust/debris at walk in freezer fans. -Crumb debris below shelves in walk in freezer. -Salt spill/trash below shelving in back dry storage area. -Debris/spill below public soda dispensers.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Mop sink in back room is pitted/worn concrete.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Broiler chest freezer lid is damaged/warped and does not close properly. -Cupboards below public beverage line don't wapper to close properly.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Some yellow debris at bottom edge of interior panel of ice machine. -Pink and/or black debris at back edges of all 3 ice chutes of soda machines.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Grease residue at edges/surfaces of hot hold units. -Debris/residue at undercounter prep areas near broiler. -Sticky residue at handles of shake station refrigerator. -Heavy limescale at side edge/table top of frozen drink machine. -Fryer cleaning equipment/gloves are heavily soiled with grease residue up at storage area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Debris/spill below public beverage line cabinets.
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
